Therapies: Tracheostomy Care (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received tracheostomy care in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
982 INVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD INVSV_VNTLTR_ADMSN_CD O0110F1A Therapies: Invasive Mechanical Ventilator (Admis) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received invasive mechanical ventilator treatment days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the
